---
title: "CV"
author: "Your Name"
jobtitle: ""
address: "Department, Institution, City, Country"
email: "you@example.org"
phone: ""
github: "your-github-handle"
web: "your-website.example.org"
orcid: ""
fontawesome: true
updated: true
keywords:
  - academic CV
  - Quarto
  - LaTeX

format:
  qkit-pdf: default
---

# Education

::: {.cv-entries}
- 2022 - Current | **Your Department**, Your University, Country, Ph.D. in Your Field
- 2017 - 2019 | **Your Department**, Earlier University, Country, M.Sc. in Your Field
- 2012 - 2017 | **Your Department**, Earlier University, Country, B.A. in Your Field
:::

# Publications

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Title of Your First Published Paper, 2026, with Co-Author A and Co-Author B. **Journal Name**, vol. X, p. 1-20. [Link](https://example.org/paper1)
2. Title of Your Second Published Paper, 2025, with Co-Author C. **Another Journal**, vol. Y, p. 100-150. [Link](https://example.org/paper2)
:::

# Working Papers

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Title of Your First Working Paper, 2026, with Co-Author A.
2. Title of Your Second Working Paper, 2026. Available at [SSRN](https://example.org/ssrn).
:::

# Work-in-Progress

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Title of an In-Progress Project, with Co-Author A.
2. Another In-Progress Project.
:::

# Statistical Software Packages

::: {.cv-publications}
1. yourpackage: One-line Description, 2026. *R package version 0.1.0*. [Link](https://example.org/yourpackage)
:::

# Conferences and Workshops

- Conference Name A (City, Year), Conference Name B (City, Year), Workshop C* (City, Year).
- \hspace{1em} *\textit{Presentations by co-authors}

# Research Experience

- **Your University**, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2022 - Current | Postgraduate Researcher
  :::

# Teaching Experience

- **Undergraduate** \textbf{\small as Teaching Assistant}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2025 | **Course Name**, Your Department, Your University
  :::

# Grants and Scholarships

::: {.cv-entries}
- 2022 - Current | Name of Your Scholarship.
:::

# Other Academic Services

::: {.cv-keys}
- Referee | Journal A, Journal B, Journal C.
:::

# Languages

::: {.cv-keys}
- Language A | Native
- Language B | Fluent
:::

# Research Interests

List your research interests here as a comma-separated paragraph.

# References

::: {.cv-references}
::: {.referee}
**[Referee A, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-a)**\
Department\
University\
Address\
\Letter\ [a@example.org](mailto:a@example.org)
:::

::: {.referee}
**[Referee B, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-b)**\
Department\
University\
Address\
\Letter\ [b@example.org](mailto:b@example.org)
:::
:::

# Other

::: {.cv-keys}
- Nationality | Your Nationality
:::
